title: Panalpina India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)

jsonLd.title: Panalpina India is Hiring: Warehouse Manager (Mid-Level)
jsonLd.description:
Panalpina India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Warehouse Manager at our Bhubaneswar location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Panalpina India:
Panalpina India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Manage relationships with third-party logistics providers
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customs Clearance
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bhubaneswar, Odisha, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Panalpina India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
